title: FillTable
description: POST /api/FillTable — Fills a table in a PPTX template with dynamic data rows. The template must contain a table (inside a GraphicFrame) with a header row. Column count and header placeholders are defined in the template. Send as multipart/form-data with a 'template' file field (.pptx) and a 'tableData' text field containing this JSON.

shapeName.description: The name of the table shape on the slide (visible in PowerPoint's Selection Pane, e.g. 'Table 1' or 'Tabelle 3'). Case-insensitive matching.

headers.description: Optional placeholder-to-value mapping for the header row (row 0). Each key is a placeholder string (e.g. '{{Col1}}') and the value is the replacement text.

rows.description: Data rows to insert into the table. Each row is an array of strings with the same length as the number of columns in the template table.

items.description: One row of cell values. The order matches the column order in the template.
